title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Udemy India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Udemy India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
